nasb.text: On the following day he entered Caesarea. Now Cornelius was waiting for them and had called together his relatives and close friends.

esv.text: And on the following day they entered Caesarea. Cornelius was expecting them and had called together his relatives and close friends.

cnv.text: 第三天，他們到了該撒利亞。哥尼流已經招聚了自己的親戚好友在恭候他們。

ccb.text: 又过了一天，他们到达凯撒利亚。哥尼流已经请来亲朋好友，在等候他们。

csbs.text: 又过了一天，他们进了凯撒里亚。哥尼流已经召集了他的亲属和好友，等候着他们。
